proofs.claim: duplicate tap does not create a second accounting RPC
proofs.test: does not send duplicate accounting requests while an action is already in flight

proofs.claim: stale server truth cannot be rendered as final success
proofs.test: does not claim success when server truth is stale after handoff

proofs.claim: post-mutation success depends on authoritative readback
proofs.test: reads authoritative server state after accounting handoff before success

proofs.claim: client no longer recreates final accounting flags
proofs.test: rejects stale server state instead of recreating final flags locally
keeps adapter fallback visible as partial success instead of masking it

proofs.claim: failed internal steps do not trigger downstream finance RPCs
proofs.test: does not call downstream finance RPC after failed internal attachment step
